chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Constitution Petition No. D – 836 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Priority 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.3995/2024 (Stay). 3. For hearing of main case. 17.10.2025. Malik Waseem Iqbal, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Sheharyar Qazi, A.A.G. ----------- Learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that though the previous contract awarded by the Respondent No.2 for collection of Cattle Piri Fee at Cattle Colony has since expired, the grievance of the Petitioner remains that while awarding contracts for such collection the Respondent No.2 does not adhere to Rule 5 of the Sindh Local Councils (Auctioning of Collection Rights) Rules, 2016. In that regard he further submits that it has now been four months since expiry of the last contract and auction of further collection has still not been advertised as per said Rules. We disposed of the petition along with listed application with the direction to Respondent No.2 to ensure compliance with Rule 5 of the Sindh Local Councils (Auctioning of Collection Rights) Rules, 2016. JUDGE JUDGE Nadeem Qureshi P.A.
